# define normalization
import re
ar_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'

def normalize_ar(text):
    if not isinstance(text,str):
        return ''
    # replace tatweel
    text = text.replace(tatweel,'')
    # remove diacritics
    text = ar_diacritics.sub('', text)
    # unify hamza variants: represent all hamzas as \u0621 perhaps or standardized? 
    # Replace variations with bare hamza forms. Common variations: ا أ إ آ ؤ ئ ء
    # Map to base forms: ا, و, ي, ء?
    # For simplicity, normalize alef variants to ا, hamza on waw to و? better map all to simple.
    text = (text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
                .replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي'))
    # Remove punctuation and diacritic marks not removed: punctuation
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', text)  # remove non-word non-Arabic characters
    # collapse spaces and lower (no lower in Arabic but keep)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

# test normalization on snippet

    for t in txts:

len(matches), matches[:5]

        f1 = token_f1(norm_snip, norm)
        seq = seq_ratio(norm_snip, norm)
        score = max(f1, seq)
        if score > best_score:
